attributes.additional_details: Currently, the approval rating of the current prime minister is under 12%, the lowest in the UK's history. It is clear that the country does not want Kier Starmer in office any more. The point in a democracy is to have a leader the majority of the country wants in office. 12% is not a majority, therefore this country is slowly slipping away from being a democracy.
attributes.background: We want the prime minister Sir Kier Starmer to call a general election promptly as he is no longer wanted in office.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign this petition:

General election now – and always call one if a PM is replaced
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/771833
